creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
life is better when you stay at one of the world’s best hotel 2024 @capellabangkok ✨🥂💃🏨🛁✨ #bangkokhotel #thailand 

📍a luxury hotel I found on @trip.best_official @trip list & the experience is absolutely delightful

🛌 stayed in the Premium River View Deluxe Room offering breathtaking views of the Chao Phraya River

🍷check out Chin Chin hour, 2 Michelin Star  @cote.bangkok @phranakhon.bangkok & @stellabar.bangkok for outstanding food & drinks selection 

🏖️ enjoy private check in, relax by the pool, spa, arrange a special activity at the Culturist [ I did a traditional Thai monkey character painting ] or take a private free ferry ride to Icon Siam, my stay at Capella Bangkok is memorable & exceptional 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #capellabangkok #luxuryhotel #bangkokhotel #tripbest #tripcom #amazingthailand #stellabarbkk #phranakhonbangkok
